% check a.php
a.php:12:1: $bar is of type: Path\To\Module\Bar (DEBUG)

% check b.php
b.php:12:1: $bar is of type: Path\To\Module\Bar (DEBUG)

% check c.php
c.php:6:1: $bar is of type: Path\To\Module\Bar (DEBUG)

% check d.php
d.php:4:2: unused use statement: AAA
d.php:9:10: class Path\To\Grouped\BBB\Foo not found
d.php:10:10: class Path\To\Grouped\CCC\Foo not found

% check e.php
e.php:3:5: unused use statement: Unused
e.php:4:27: unused use statement: AlsoUnused

% check f.php

% check g.php

% check h.php

-- a.php --
<?php

namespace Path\To;

class View
{
	public function getInstance(): Module\Bar;
}

$v = new View;
$bar = $v->getInstance();
#debugType $bar
-- b.php --
<?php

use Path\To\Module\Bar;

class View
{
	public function getInstance(): Bar;
}

$v = new View;
$bar = $v->getInstance();
#debugType $bar
-- c.php --
<?php

use Path\To\Module as Other;

$bar = new Other\Bar;
#debugType $bar
-- util.php --
<?php

namespace Path\To\Module;

use const FOO_BAR;
use function is_array;

class Bar
{
}
-- d.php --
<?php

use Path\To\Grouped\{
	AAA,
	BBB,
	CCC as DDD
};

$x = new BBB\Foo;
$x = new DDD\Foo;
-- e.php --
<?php

use Path\To\Module\Unused;
use Path\To\Module\Bar as AlsoUnused;

$bar = new \Path\To\Module\Bar;
-- f.php --
<?php

use Path\To\Module as Foo;

class Contacts
{
	/** @var array<string, Foo\Bar> */
	private $contacts = [];
}
-- g.php --
<?php

use Path\To\Module as Foo;

class Printer
{
	/**
	 * @param array{id: int, name: string, company?: Foo\Bar} $vals
	 */
	public static function render(array $vals): void
	{
	}
}
-- h.php --
<?php

use Path\To\Module\Bar;

class Service
{
	public function doSomething(): void
	{
		/** @var Bar */
		$bar = getBar();
	}
}
